description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the continuumio/miniconda3 Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt, install libgomp1, append ./bin to PATH, ./lib to LD_LIBRARY_PATH, ./z3 to PYTHONPATH, and make bin/z3 executable. Define a single stage named test (the default) and add a test job in that stage. The test job executes the commands 'z3 test.txt' and then uses find to locate all .py files except those under ./z3 and runs each with python via '-exec python {} \;'. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are configured.
